name: Gharazi-pk
description: Sprint 1 backend foundation for a Pakistan real-estate portal.

scripts.build: nest build api && nest build worker
scripts.search:bootstrap: node -e "fetch((process.env.API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3001') + '/admin/search/bootstrap', {method: 'POST', headers: process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN ? {Authorization: 'Bearer ' + process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN} : {}}).then(async r => { console.log(await r.text()); process.exit(r.ok ? 0 : 1); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.search:status: node -e "fetch(process.env.API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3001/admin/search/status', {headers: process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN ? {Authorization: 'Bearer ' + process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN} : {}}).then(async r => { console.log(await r.text()); process.exit(r.ok ? 0 : 1); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.search:reindex:listings: node -e "fetch((process.env.API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3001') + '/admin/search/reindex/listings', {method: 'POST', headers: process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN ? {Authorization: 'Bearer ' + process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN} : {}}).then(async r => { console.log(await r.text()); process.exit(r.ok ? 0 : 1); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.search:reindex:projects: node -e "fetch((process.env.API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3001') + '/admin/search/reindex/projects', {method: 'POST', headers: process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN ? {Authorization: 'Bearer ' + process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN} : {}}).then(async r => { console.log(await r.text()); process.exit(r.ok ? 0 : 1); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.search:reindex:areas: node -e "fetch((process.env.API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3001') + '/admin/search/reindex/areas', {method: 'POST', headers: process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN ? {Authorization: 'Bearer ' + process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN} : {}}).then(async r => { console.log(await r.text()); process.exit(r.ok ? 0 : 1); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
